sample_slides.title: Title < Space Grotesk Bold> - 33 pt
sample_slides.preview:
Subtitle (optional) <Space Grotesk> - 22 pt | Main text for ‘bullet points’ <Raleway or Space Grotesk> – 15+ pt

Emphasize important words with color

Use empty lines

sample_slides.title: Alternative Style Title – 33 pt
sample_slides.preview:
Alternative Style Title – 33 pt | Subtitle - 25,5 pt I “sub-subtitle – 21 pt” | Main text for bullet points – 22-24 pt & Bold

Emphasize important words with color

Use empty lines between points or i

sample_slides.title: Color usage I “How do I pick the right color?”
sample_slides.preview:
Color usage I “How do I pick the right color?” | Style guide | The lighter the background – the darker the highlights
Use hard or darkened colors for light backgrounds
And pastel colo | New colors should always be introduced by adding  or removing brightness to existing colors

sample_slides.title: Examples I “How do I pick the right color?”

Examples I “How do I pick the right color?” | Storytelling | The pipet is your biggest friend

sample_slides.title: Best practices I Consistency & Takeaways
sample_slides.preview:
Best practices I Consistency & Takeaways | Style guide | Don’t move the title or subtitle unless absolutely necessary
If so, copy the new placement to all other slides | Copying elements from another slide (or deck) is always better
Especially when creating stories with compounded icons
